name: unslop-reasoning
description: > Strip AI-slop patterns from reasoning traces (chain-of-thought, extended thinking, agent decomposition) — not final prose. Reasoning text has its own slop catalog that regular unslop doesn't target: over-explaining the question, over-hedging, over-decomposing trivial problems into 6-bullet substeps, infinite-loop rationalization. Trigger: /unslop-reasoning, "clean up my reasoning", "fix this chain of thought", "this CoT sounds robotic". Applies to reasoning output; does not override regular /u
author: MohamedAbdallah-14
summary_zh: 专门清理 AI 推理过程里的套路化痕迹，比如反复复述问题、过度铺垫、把简单问题拆成六步小标题、自我循环论证等，让思维链读起来更像人写的。适合处理 chain-of-thought、扩展思考或 agent 拆解输出，不影响最终正文。
